login.title: Welcome back!
login.description: Access the trusted university marketplace. Buy, sell and connect with students in your community.

signup.description: Join the trusted university marketplace. Buy, sell and connect with students in your community.

newPassword.description: Enter your new password to recover access.

slides.title: Exchange
slides.description: Buy, sell, and exchange products easily with other students at your university.

slides.title: Connect
slides.description: Find students near you and discover useful products within your community.

slides.title: Save
slides.description: Find what you need at the best price within your trusted university community.

about.title: About Us
about.missionText: Connect university students so they can buy, sell, and exchange products easily, safely, and within their own community.
about.visionText: To be the reference university marketplace in Latin America, fostering the circular economy and sense of community among students.

items.question: How do I contact a seller?
items.answer: Go to the product and tap the Seller tab. There you'll find the seller's profile to coordinate delivery.

items.question: How do I publish a product?
items.answer: Tap the + button in the navigation bar, fill out the form with photos, name, price and product condition.

items.question: Is it safe to buy here?
items.answer: All users are verified university students. We recommend making exchanges in public places on campus.

items.question: Can I delete my product?
items.answer: Yes. Go to Settings → My Products and tap DELETE on the product you want to remove.

items.question: How does the exchange work?
items.answer: You can publish your product indicating that you accept exchanges in the description and coordinate directly with the seller.

terms.title: Terms & Privacy
terms.termsText: By using Bondu you agree that you are an active university student. Publishing illegal, counterfeit products or those that violate third-party rights is prohibited. Bondu is not responsible for transactions made outside the platform. The user is responsible for the accuracy of published information.
terms.privacyText: The personal information you provide (name, email, university) is used solely for the app's operation. We do not share your data with third parties. You can request deletion of your account and data at any time from Settings.
